article_meta.title: Former President Donald Trump speaks at a campaign rally on April 27, 2023, in Manchester, New Hampshire

reasoning: The model avoided quoting errors but largely missed clear author-prose bias and instead raised speculative, meta-level claims. It also mislabeled bias types and used markdown fences despite instructions.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: No quoted or attributed language was flagged; items were meta descriptions.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Both flagged items are speculative editorial critiques (story choice, negativity) rather than concrete bias in the author's prose, making them weak/overreaching.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear author-prose bias such as 'But Trump has given listeners no reason to believe him on this,' 'people should treat his story with great skepticism,' 'Breitbart’s vague and unverified claim,' and 'late Cuban despot Fidel Castro.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Applied 'Negativity Bias' where 'Bias by Omission' or 'Slant' might be more apt, and the 'Story Choice and Placement' claim is debatable; labels do not closely match concrete in-text issues.
